mapper.select: select t.TaskId,c.taskName,c.StartDate,c.PlanEndDate,c.Remarks,sum(t.CompletePercentage)AS total, count(t.WorkDate) keepDays from constructionmanage c RIGHT JOIN taskprogress t ON c.id=t.taskid GROUP BY t.TaskId
select sum(CompletePercentage) as total ,CONCAT(YEAR(WorkDate),'-',QUARTER(WorkDate) )AS `QUARTER` FROM `taskprogress` WHERE TaskId =#{TaskId} GROUP BY `QUARTER`
